changeSet.author: aurora-hms
changeSet.comment: Add lifecycleKind to appointment.lifecycle SMS template variables_schema.allowed when missing.
changeSet.sql: UPDATE communication.comm_template t SET variables_schema = jsonb_set( t.variables_schema::jsonb, '{allowed}', COALESCE(t.variables_schema::jsonb->'allowed', '[]'::jsonb) || jsonb_build_array('lifecycleKind') )::text WHERE t.template_key = 'appointment.lifecycle' AND t.channel = 'SMS' AND t.variables_schema IS NOT NULL AND length(trim(t.variables_schema)) > 0 AND NOT (COALESCE(t.variables_schema::jsonb->'allowed', '[]'::jsonb) @> '["lifecycleKind"]'::jsonb);
